#  View the Change History of an RFI 
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/permissions)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **RFIs** tool.
  2. Locate the desired RFI in the list. Click **View**.
  3. Click the **Change History** tab.


## See Also
  * [Revise an RFI](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/tutorials/revise-an-rfi)
  * [RFIs - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/permissions)
  * [View the Distribution History of a Custom RFI Report](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/rfi-project/tutorials/view-the-distribution-history-of-a-custom-rfi-report)
title: View the Change History of an RFI
description: How to view the change history of an RFI in the project's RFIs tool.
